title: Adaptation Recommendations
description: A collection of AI-generated recommendations for adapting a creative work to a different medium, with explainable reasoning and evidence for each decision.

id.description: Unique identifier for this recommendation set

version.description: Semantic version of this recommendation schema (e.g., '1.0.0')

creativeDnaId.description: Reference to the Creative DNA profile this recommendation is based on

sourceWork.description: Information about the source work being adapted

targetMedium.description: The medium to which the work is being adapted

format.description: Specific format within the medium (e.g., 'feature film', 'limited series', 'open-world RPG')

estimatedLength.description: Estimated length of the adapted work

platform.description: Intended platform or distribution channel (e.g., 'theatrical', 'streaming', 'Broadway', 'console gaming')

overallStrategy.description: High-level strategic approach to the adaptation

corePreservation.description: Core elements that must be preserved from the source

targetAudienceAdjustments.description: How the target audience differs and what adjustments are needed

recommendations.description: Individual adaptation recommendations with explainable reasoning

recommendationId.description: Unique identifier for this individual recommendation

proposedChange.description: Clear description of the proposed change or adaptation decision

sourceEvidence.description: Evidence from the source work supporting this recommendation

elements.description: Specific elements from the source work (characters, scenes, themes, etc.)

context.description: Context explaining how these elements relate to the recommendation

quotes.description: Relevant quotes or specific references from the source (if applicable)

reasoning.description: Detailed explanation of why this change is recommended, connecting source evidence to the proposed change

mediumPrinciple.description: The medium-specific principle or constraint that drives this recommendation

principle.description: Name or brief statement of the medium principle (e.g., 'Show, don't tell', 'Visual storytelling', 'Real-time constraints')

explanation.description: How this principle applies to the target medium and why it necessitates the change

creativeBenefit.description: The creative benefits of implementing this recommendation

primary.description: Main creative benefit (e.g., 'Enhances emotional impact', 'Improves pacing', 'Strengthens character arc')

secondary.description: Additional benefits or positive side effects

audienceImpact.description: How this benefits the audience experience

potentialRisk.description: Potential risks or challenges of implementing this recommendation

mitigation.description: Strategies to mitigate or manage these risks

tradeoffs.description: What might be lost or compromised by making this change

score.description: Confidence score from 0 (low confidence) to 1 (high confidence)

sourceClarity.description: How clear the source material is regarding this element

mediumFit.description: How well this aligns with target medium conventions

precedent.description: Whether similar adaptations have been done successfully

uncertainties.description: Specific uncertainties or unknowns affecting confidence

alternativeApproach.description: Alternative approach(es) to this adaptation decision

comparison.description: How this alternative compares to the primary recommendation

whenToConsider.description: Circumstances under which the alternative might be preferable

decisionStatus.description: Current status of this recommendation in the decision-making process

priority.description: Priority level for implementing this recommendation

dependencies.description: IDs of other recommendations this depends on or relates to

notes.description: Additional notes or context for this recommendation

model.description: AI model used to generate these recommendations (e.g., 'IBM Granite 3.0')

parameters.description: Parameters used for the AI analysis

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this recommendation set was created

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this recommendation set was last updated
